The visitors won the last meeting against the West Indies in this format thanks to an impressive 164-run victory in Galle. TNT.Sports.4.HD.uk.subtitle: Ireland v India-2nd T20
TNT.Sports.4.HD.uk.description: Ireland v India. Coverage of the second and final T20 in the series from Stormont Cricket Ground in Belfast. Coming into this series the visitors had won all eight of their matches in this format against Ireland, with the first game being played back in 2009. TNT.Sports.4.HD.uk.title: Live Test Cricket
TNT.Sports.4.HD.uk.subtitle: West Indies v Sri Lanka-1st Test, Day Four
TNT.Sports.4.HD.uk.description: West Indies v Sri Lanka. Coverage of the fourth day of the First Test in the two-match series from Sir Vivian Richards Stadium in Antigua. The hosts haven't won the first game in a series against Sri Lanka since an impressive 226-run win over them in a three-match contest back in June 2018. West Indies made scores of 414-8 declared and 223-7 declared in their two innings as they bowled their visitors out for 185 and 226 to claim a well-earned victory.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: The View

Later, the ladies welcome various celebrities, who join them in a chat or perform for the audience. The program also offers tips on beauty, fashion, diet and relationships. Known for their freewheeling style, the hosts are often lampooned in late-night sketches.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: Jimmy Kimmel Live!
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Emmy-winning funnyman Jimmy Kimmel serves up comedy bits and welcomes guests that include other comics, celebrities, athletes and musicians, as well as everyday people with unusual or compelling personal stories. Kimmel's family and friends take part in the festivities, including his Cousin Sal, Uncle Frank (until his death in 2011) and childhood friend Cleto Escobedo III, who leads the show's house band. Recurring segments include the FCC-pleasing This Week in Unnecessary Censorship in which they take TV clips and "bleep and blur things whether they need it or not," as Kimmel describes it. But it's too bad they consistently run out of time for Matt Damon's segment.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: After reuniting with Joel at a funeral, Sam takes stock of herself and her actions and decides to make things right with her best friend; everyone comes together for an epic celebration of love and partnership at Fred and Susan's wedding.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Somebody Somewhere
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: Dinky Dinkies
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Overwhelmed by the amount of change happening in the lives of her loved ones, Sam is hit especially hard by a friend's brutally honest comment; Sam helps Brad with a special task ahead of his and Joel's housewarming.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Somebody Somewhere
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: Porch Lyfe
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Tricia shakes things up at the country club; Joel and Brad navigate their new normal; Sam finally sees a doctor.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Somebody Somewhere
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: What if It Spreads?
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Sam and Tricia's trip to Kansas City hits an unexpected snag; Joel runs into a complicated figure from his past at Brad's bible book club.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Dust Bunny
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Ten-year-old Aurora asks a hit man to kill the monster she believes ate her entire family. To protect her, he'll need to battle an onslaught of assassins while accepting the fact that some monsters are real.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Curse of La Llorona
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In the 1970s Los Angeles, the legendary ghost La Llorona is stalking the night -- and the children. Ignoring the eerie warning of a troubled mother, a social worker and her own kids are drawn into a frightening supernatural realm. Their only hope of surviving La Llorona's deadly wrath is a disillusioned priest who practices mysticism to keep evil at bay.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Florida Project
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Set in the shadow of the most magical place on Earth, 6-year-old Moonee and her two best friends forge their own adventures, while Moonee's struggling mom and a kindhearted motel manager protect the kids from the harsh reality that surrounds them.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Cal Weaver (Steve Carell) is living the American dream. He has a good job, a beautiful house, great children and a beautiful wife, named Emily (Julianne Moore). Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Brutalist
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Escaping postwar Europe, a visionary architect arrives in America to rebuild his life. On his own in a strange new country, a wealthy industrialist recognizes his talent -- but power and legacy comes at a heavy cost.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Larry Kramer in Love and Anger
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Filmmaker Jean Carlomusto examines the life of Larry Kramer, playwright, author and activist for gay rights.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Breslin and Hamill: Deadline Artists
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The lives and careers of journalists Jimmy Breslin and Pete Hamill.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Boys Go to Jupiter
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Billy 5000, a teenage gig worker with a rise-and-grind mindset, aims to make $5,000. His quest is derailed by a gelatinous alien's appearance.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Battle of the Sexes
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The 1973 tennis match between Billie Jean King and Bobby Riggs became the most watched televised sports event of all time. Trapped in the media glare, King and Riggs were on opposites sides of a binary argument, but off-court each was fighting more personal and complex battles. With her husband urging her to fight for equal pay, the private King was also struggling to come to terms with her own sexuality, while Riggs gambled his legacy and reputation in a bid to relive the glories of his past.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Judy
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Thirty years after starring in "The Wizard of Oz," beloved actress and singer Judy Garland arrives in London to perform sold-out shows at the Talk of the Town nightclub. While there, she reminisces with friends and fans and begins a whirlwind romance with musician Mickey Deans, her soon-to-be fifth husband.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydia's life gets turned upside down when her daughter discovers a portal to the afterlife. When someone says Beetlejuice's name three times, the mischievous demon returns to unleash his very own brand of mayhem.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Freaky Tales
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: An NBA star, a corrupt cop, a female rap duo, teenage punks, neo-Nazis and a debt collector embark on a collision course in 1987 Oakland, Calif.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: This Is Spinal Tap
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: "This Is Spinal Tap" shines a light on the self-contained universe of a metal band struggling to get back on the charts, including everything from its complicated history of ups and downs, gold albums, name changes and undersold concert dates, along with the full host of requisite groupies, promoters, hangers-on and historians, sessions, release events and those special behind-the-scenes moments that keep it all real.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Documentarian Marty DiBergi follows estranged Spinal Tap bandmates David St. Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel and Derek Smalls as they search for a drummer and prepare for a reunion concert in New Orleans. Joined by music royalty Paul McCartney and Elton John, Spinal Tap wrestles with their checkered past to put on a show they hope will solidify their place in the pantheon of rock 'n' roll.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Dead of Winter
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A grief-stricken widow stops by a remote cabin after getting lost on the back roads of Minnesota in the middle of winter. She soon finds herself in a desperate fight for survival as she encounters a murderous couple holding a young woman hostage.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Death of a Unicorn
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A weekend retreat has deadly consequences when a father and daughter accidentally hit and kill a unicorn while en route to find his billionaire boss, who seeks to exploit the creature's miraculous curative properties.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Martin Lawrence: You So Crazy
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Filmed at a sold-out Majestic Theater in Brooklyn, N.Y., comedian Martin Lawrence delivers his first full-length stand-up special. Harking back to Eddie Murphy, the leather-clad comic riffs on drugs, jail, his impoverished upbringing with his mother and his luck -- or lack thereof -- with women. He also speaks at length about racism and the Rodney King ruling and subsequent riots. Lawrence even offers his unique perspective on how to maintain a successful relationship.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Frankenstein 1970
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The baron's grandson (Boris Karloff) rents the family castle to a TV crew to fund his atomic revival of the family monster.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Wuthering Heights
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In this adaptation of the classic Emily Brontë novel set in 19th-century England, wealthy young Cathy Earnshaw (Merle Oberon) shares a loving bond with Heathcliff (Laurence Olivier), a poor childhood friend who now works in her stables. Unfortunately, things become complicated when the affluent Edgar Linton (David Niven) decides to pursue Cathy, and Heathcliff leaves out of resentment. Though Heathcliff returns with a self-made fortune, he realizes he may have lost Cathy in his absence.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: All the Beauty and the Bloodshed
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: From Academy Award winner Laura Poitras comes an epic, emotional and interconnected story about internationally renowned artist and activist Nan Goldin told through her slideshows, intimate interviews, ground-breaking photography, and rare footage of her personal fight to hold the Sackler family accountable for the opioid crisis. The film interweaves Goldin's past and present, the deeply personal and urgently political, from P.A.I.N.'s (Prescription Addiction Intervention Now) actions.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: After Truth: Disinformation and the Cost of Fake News
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Filmmaker Andrew Rossi examines the rising phenomenon of fake news and how it impacts the average citizen in the United States.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Joker
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Forever alone in a crowd, failed comedian Arthur Fleck seeks connection as he walks the streets of Gotham City. Arthur wears two masks -- the one he paints for his day job as a clown, and the guise he projects in a futile attempt to feel like he's part of the world around him. Isolated, bullied and disregarded by society, Fleck begins a slow descent into madness as he transforms into the criminal mastermind known as the Joker.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Joker: Folie à Deux
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Struggling with his dual identity, failed comedian Arthur Fleck stumbles upon true love while incarcerated at Arkham State Hospital. Awaiting trial for the murder of five people, Fleck soon discovers the music that's always been inside him.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In 1970, paranormal investigators and demonologists Lorraine (Vera Farmiga) and Ed (Patrick Wilson) Warren are summoned to the home of Carolyn (Lili Taylor) and Roger (Ron Livingston) Perron. The Perrons and their five daughters have recently moved into a secluded farmhouse, where a supernatural presence has made itself known. Though the manifestations are relatively benign at first, events soon escalate in horrifying fashion, especially after the Warrens discover the house's macabre history.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In 1977, paranormal investigators Ed (Patrick Wilson) and Lorraine Warren come out of a self-imposed sabbatical to travel to Enfield, a borough in north London. There, they meet Peggy Hodgson, an overwhelmed single mother of four who tells the couple that something evil is in her home. Ed and Lorraine believe her story when the youngest daughter starts to show signs of demonic possession. As the Warrens try to help the besieged girl, they become the next targets of the malicious spirit.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren take on one of the most sensational cases of their careers after a cop stumbles upon a dazed and bloodied young man walking down the road. Accused of murder, the suspect claims demonic possession as his defense, forcing the Warrens into a supernatural inquiry unlike anything they've ever seen before.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In 1986 paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren travel to Pennsylvania to vanquish a demon from a family's home.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Spring Breakers
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: College students Candy (Vanessa Hudgens), Faith (Selena Gomez), Brit (Ashley Benson) and Cotty (Rachel Korine) are short of the cash they need for a spring-break trip, so they rob a diner and head down to Florida. However, the police soon break up the party and arrest them. The curvaceous quartet are unexpectedly bailed out by a drug dealer and aspiring rap artist named Alien (James Franco). Soon after, three of the four gal pals decide to join Alien in a life of crime.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Lurker
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A retail employee infiltrates the inner circle of an artist on the verge of stardom. As he gets closer to the budding music star, access and proximity become a matter of life and death.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: A Complete Unknown
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In the early 1960s, 19-year-old Bob Dylan arrives in New York with his guitar and revolutionary talent, destined to change the course of American music. Forming his most intimate relationships during his rise to fame, he grows restless with the folk movement, making a controversial choice that reverberates worldwide.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Bring Me the Beauties
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After meeting Frederick von Mierers, a guru who preaches New Age spirituality, the young Hoyt Richards adopts and spreads his teachings.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Bring Me the Beauties
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: The Antichrist Tapes
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: As Frederick prepares for a coming global cataclysm, model Jacki Adams joins Eternal Values and exposes the group's true nature.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Bring Me the Beauties
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Mind Games
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The group splinters and eventually dwindles in North Carolina; as 1999 approaches, Hoyt grows skeptical and escapes to California where he grapples with the shame and regret of recruiting others while hurting his own family, as he reconnects and reflects on his experiences with former members.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Dune
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Paul Atreides, a brilliant and gifted young man born into a great destiny beyond his understanding, must travel to a dangerous planet in the universe to ensure the future of his family and his people. As malevolent forces explode into conflict over the planet's exclusive supply of a precious resource in existence, only those who can conquer their own fear will survive.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Dune: Part Two
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Paul Atreides unites with Chani and the Fremen while seeking revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he must prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: John Wick
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Legendary assassin John Wick (Keanu Reeves) retired from his violent career after marrying the love of his life. Her sudden death leaves John in deep mourning. When sadistic mobster Iosef Tarasov (Alfie Allen) and his thugs steal John's prized car and kill the puppy that was a last gift from his wife, John unleashes the remorseless killing machine within and seeks vengeance. Meanwhile, Iosef's father (Michael Nyqvist) -- John's former colleague -- puts a huge bounty on John's head.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: John Wick: Chapter 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Retired super-assassin John Wick's plans to resume a quiet civilian life are cut short when Italian gangster Santino D'Antonio shows up on his doorstep with a gold marker, compelling him to repay past favors. Ordered by Winston, kingpin of secret assassin society The Continental, to respect the organization's ancient code, Wick reluctantly accepts the assignment to travel to Rome to take out D'Antonio's sister, the ruthless capo atop the Italian Camorra crime syndicate.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 -- Parabellum
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After gunning down a member of the High Table -- the shadowy international assassin's guild -- legendary hit man John Wick finds himself stripped of the organization's protective services. Now stuck with a $14 million bounty on his head, Wick must fight his way through the streets of New York as he becomes the target of the world's most ruthless killers.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: John Wick: Chapter 4
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: With the price on his head ever-increasing, legendary hit man John Wick takes his fight against the High Table global as he seeks out the most powerful players in the underworld, from New York to Paris to Japan to Berlin.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: From the World of John Wick: Ballerina
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Trained in the assassin traditions of the Ruska Roma, Eve Macarro takes on an army of killers as she seeks revenge against those responsible for the death of her father.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Mummy
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Sorry, Baby
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Something terrible happened to Agnes. But life goes on for everyone else. When a friend visits on the brink of an important milestone, Agnes realizes how stuck she's been, in this bittersweet story of finding your way after your world comes crashing down.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Norm of the North
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Norm (Rob Schneider) the polar bear doesn't know how to hunt, but he does possess the unique ability to talk to humans. When the wealthy Mr. Greene (Ken Jeong) unveils his idea to build luxury condos in the Arctic, Norm realizes that his beloved home is in jeopardy. Accompanied by three mischievous lemmings, Norm stows away on a ship to New York. Once there, he meets a surprising ally (Maya Kay) who helps him hatch a scheme to sabotage the shady developer's plans.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Nine Lives
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Tom Brand is a billionaire whose workaholic lifestyle takes him away from his loving wife Lara and adorable daughter Rebecca. Needing a present for Rebecca's 11th birthday, Brand buys a seemingly harmless cat from a mysterious pet store. Suddenly, a bizarre turn of events traps poor Tom inside the animal's body. The owner of the business tells him that he has one week to reconnect with his family, or live out the rest of his days as a cute and furry feline named Mr. Fuzzypants.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: All is well at Mossy Bottom Farm, except for the fact that the animals will do anything to get out of work. So, Shaun the sheep and his scheming friends devise a plan to put their master to sleep. However, the ruse backfires when the poor farmer finds himself transported to the big city, having lost his memory. Now, it's up to Sean, Timmy the lamb, Shirley the ewe and the rest of the gang to travel to the metropolis and get him back, while not landing in even more trouble themselves.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The battle for NINJAGO City calls to action young Master Builder Lloyd, aka the Green Ninja, along with his friends, also secret ninja warriors. Led by Master Wu, as wise-cracking as he is wise, they must defeat the evil warlord Garmadon, who also happens to be Lloyd's dad. Pitting father against son, the epic showdown tests these fierce but undisciplined modern-day ninjas as they learn to check their egos and pull together to unleash the inner power of Spinjitzu.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Charlie Hustle & the Matter of Pete Rose
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: The Longshot
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: At the age of 81, more than three decades after receiving a lifetime ban for gambling, former Cincinnati Reds star Pete Rose reignites his quest for reinstatement into Major League Baseball while recounting his unlikely rise to the top of the sport.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Charlie Hustle & the Matter of Pete Rose
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: The Dirty Work
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Nicknamed "Charlie Hustle" for dirty work ethic, Pete Rose becomes the face of baseball; Rose helps transform the Cincinnati Reds into the "Big Red Machine," winning back-to-back World Series titles in the '70s.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Charlie Hustle & the Matter of Pete Rose
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: One of One
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Pete Rose becomes the highest paid player in baseball; in 1985 he breaks Ty Cobb's record to become MLB's all-time career hits leader; but a gambling scandal leads to a prison sentence and lifetime banishment from the game he loves.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Charlie Hustle & the Matter of Pete Rose
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: One Last Record
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After years of denial, in 2004, Pete Rose publicly admits that he bet on the game of baseball; Rose confronts the truth about his public image and makes one last bid for MLB reinstatement and enshrinement in the National Baseball Hall of Fame.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Gran Turismo
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The true story of a team of unlikely underdogs -- a working-class gamer, a former race car driver, and an idealistic motorsport executive -- who risk it all to take on the most elite sport in the world.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Bride of Frankenstein
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After recovering from injuries sustained in the mob attack upon himself and his creation, Dr. Frankenstein (Colin Clive) falls under the control of his former mentor, Dr. Pretorius (Ernest Thesiger), who insists the now-chastened doctor resume his experiments in creating new life. Meanwhile, the Monster (Boris Karloff) remains on the run from those who wish to destroy him without understanding that his intentions are generally good despite his lack of socialization and self-control.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Mary Shelley's Frankenstein
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: As Viktor Frankenstein (Kenneth Branagh) is dying he shares a tale of gruesome terror with a sea captain. Viktor, using previous experiments by a brilliant scientist, was able to bring a creature (Robert De Niro) assembled from body parts back to life. Once he realized how destructive his experiments had become, he abandoned the creature and tried to live a normal life with his fiance (Helena Bonham Carter). The lonely creature seeks out Viktor and demands one of two things: a bride or revenge.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Bride!
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A scientist revives a murdered woman as a companion for a legendary creature. The aftermath defies all expectations.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: I Love You Forever
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Following a young woman into and out of an emotionally abusive relationship.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: La casa del dragón
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: La ambición lleva a la muerte. Rhaenyra y Aegon compiten por un trono cada vez más débil. La traición, la profecía y el fuego cambian el destino de Westeros con sangre.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Entre nos
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.subtitle: The Winners 2
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Las presentaciones de los ganadores de la competencia de "stand-up" latino del New York Latino Film Festival: Cisco Duran y Abi Sánchez.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Cal Weaver está viviendo el sueño americano. Él tiene un buen trabajo, una casa preciosa, niños excelentes y una esposa hermosa, llamada Emily. Sin embargo, la aparente vida perfecta de Cal se derrumba cuando descubre que Emily le ha sido infiel y quiere divorciarse. Ahora, con más de 40 años, e inesperadamente soltero, Cal ingresa al vicioso mundo de las citas románticas. Jacob Palmer decide ayudar a Cal y le enseña a tener éxito con las damas.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: La casa del dragón
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: La ambición lleva a la muerte. Rhaenyra y Aegon compiten por un trono cada vez más débil. La traición, la profecía y el fuego cambian el destino de Westeros con sangre.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Entre nos
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.subtitle: Entre nos: The Winners
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Tras ganar la competencia de stand-up, los comediantes Mark Viera y Alex Carabano se presentan ante un público en vivo.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: "Wuthering Heights"
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Heathcliff, abandonado al nacer, es acogido en la apartada finca de Cumbres Borrascosas, propiedad de la acaudalada familia Earnshaw. Poco después, Heathcliff se enamora de la hija del señor de la casa, Catherine. Tras ser criados juntos, su romance se ve pronto frustrado por las barreras sociales y su pasión prohibida se transforma en una épica historia de lujuria, obsesión y locura.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: La casa del dragón
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: La ambición lleva a la muerte. Rhaenyra y Aegon compiten por un trono cada vez más débil. La traición, la profecía y el fuego cambian el destino de Westeros con sangre.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Habla y habla - Part 2
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Personas comparten historias de lo que significa ser latino en los EE.UU.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Midsommar
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Una pareja de estadounidenses acude con unos amigos a Midsommar, un festival de verano que se celebra cada 90 años en una aldea remota de Suecia. Sin embargo, lo que parecían ser unas vacaciones de ensueño toma un giro macabro cuando los aldeanos los invitan a participar en sus perturbadoras actividades festivas.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: La casa del dragón
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: La ambición lleva a la muerte. Rhaenyra y Aegon compiten por un trono cada vez más débil. La traición, la profecía y el fuego cambian el destino de Westeros con sangre.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: A Good Day to Die Hard
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: John McClane viaja a Rusia en busca de su hijo y descubre que es un agente de la CIA con una misión. Ambos deben superar sus diferencias para proteger a un testigo y evitar una catástrofe.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Pillion
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Un hombre tímido se enamora perdidamente cuando un enigmático y apuesto motociclista lo convierte en su sumiso.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: La casa del dragón
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: La ambición lleva a la muerte. Rhaenyra y Aegon compiten por un trono cada vez más débil. La traición, la profecía y el fuego cambian el destino de Westeros con sangre.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: A Complete Unknown
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: El cantante de folk Bob Dylan asciende a la cima de las listas musicales a principios de la década de 1960.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: The Greatest Showman
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: P.T. Barnum se entrega a su imaginación para crear el circo Barnum & Bailey en el siglo XIX. Con números musicales, artistas exóticos y hazañas, el fascinante espectáculo toma al mundo por asalto para convertirse en el mejor espectáculo de la Tierra.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Gran Turismo
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: El joven Jann Mardenborough gana una serie de competiciones del videojuego Gran Turismo organizadas por una importante empresa automovilística y obtiene la oportunidad de convertirse en piloto de carreras profesional. Pero eso no será un juego.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Habla Now
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Celebridades y personalidades inspiradoras de Latinoamérica hablan sobre su identidad y sus experiencias.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: El alma de la fiesta
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Después de haber sido abandonada por su esposo, Deanna, ama de casa, decide darle un giro a su vida y se inscribe en la misma universidad en la que estudia su hija. Allí se convertirá en el alma de las fiestas.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: La casa del dragón
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: La ambición lleva a la muerte. Rhaenyra y Aegon compiten por un trono cada vez más débil. La traición, la profecía y el fuego cambian el destino de Westeros con sangre.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: En letra de otro: By Goyo

Whether it's rediscovering a familiar road or taking the path less traveled, there is magic to be found around every corner. Every adventure starts with a "1st Look.".

TNT.HD.us2.title: Ocean's Thirteen
TNT.HD.us2.description: Danny Ocean and his gang hatch an ambitious plot for revenge after ruthless casino owner Willy Bank double-crosses Reuben Tishkoff, Danny's friend and mentor. First, Ocean's gang plan to hit Bank in the paycheck by reversing the precept that the house always wins. Next, they will deal a crushing blow to Bank's ego by ruining his reputation as the only hotelier to earn the Royal Review's Five Diamond Award for each of his properties.

Now, David's in big debt to his supplier and to wipe the slate clean, he must go to Mexico to pick up the guy's latest shipment. To accomplish his mission, Dave devises a foolproof plan: He packs a fake family into a huge RV and heads south of the border for a wild weekend that is sure to end with a bang.

TBS.HD.us2.title: Father of the Bride

From meeting the in-laws to wedding plans with an over-the-top consultant (Martin Short) and his flamboyant assistant (B.D. Wong), it seems as if the troubles never end in this update of the classic Spencer Tracy comedy.

TBS.HD.us2.title: Father of the Bride Part II
TBS.HD.us2.description: Just when George Banks (Steve Martin) has gotten used to his daughter, Annie (Kimberly Williams), being married, she announces that she's pregnant, making him an impending grandfather. Shaken by nearing this new milestone in his life, George soon has to process even more surprising news -- his wife, Nina (Diane Keaton), is pregnant too. Reeling from these revelations, George gets help from the eccentric Franck (Martin Short), who, conveniently, has moved from planning weddings to baby showers.

When they start playing, they free Alan Parrish, who's been stuck in the game's inner world for decades. If they win Jumanji, the kids can free Alan for good, but that means braving giant bugs, ill-mannered monkeys and even stampeding rhinos!

AMC.HD.us2.title: Independence Day
AMC.HD.us2.description: In the epic adventure film "Independence Day," strange phenomena surface around the globe. The skies ignite. Terror races through the world's major cities. As these extraordinary events unfold, it becomes increasingly clear that a force of incredible magnitude has arrived; its mission: total annihilation over the Fourth of July weekend. The last hope to stop the destruction is an unlikely group of people united by fate and unimaginable circumstances.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Top Gun
AMC.HD.us2.description: The Top Gun Naval Fighter Weapons School is where the best of the best train to refine their elite flying skills. When hotshot fighter pilot Maverick (Tom Cruise) is sent to the school, his reckless attitude and cocky demeanor put him at odds with the other pilots, especially the cool and collected Iceman (Val Kilmer). But Maverick isn't only competing to be the top fighter pilot, he's also fighting for the attention of his beautiful flight instructor, Charlotte Blackwood (Kelly McGillis).

AMC.HD.us2.title: Jerry Maguire
AMC.HD.us2.description: When slick sports agent Jerry Maguire (Tom Cruise) has a crisis of conscience, he pens a heartfelt company-wide memo that promptly gets him fired. Desperate to hang on to the athletes that he represents, Jerry starts his own management firm, with only single mother Dorothy Boyd (Renee Zellweger) joining him in his new venture. Banking on their sole client, football player Rod Tidwell (Cuba Gooding Jr.), Jerry and Dorothy begin to fall in love as they struggle to make their business work.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Apollo 13
AMC.HD.us2.description: This Hollywood drama is based on the events of the Apollo 13 lunar mission, astronauts Jim Lovell (Tom Hanks), Fred Haise (Bill Paxton) and Jack Swigert (Kevin Bacon) find everything going according to plan after leaving Earth's orbit. However, when an oxygen tank explodes, the scheduled moon landing is called off. Subsequent tensions within the crew and numerous technical problems threaten both the astronauts' survival and their safe return to Earth.

AMC.HD.us2.title: True Lies
AMC.HD.us2.description: Secretly a spy but thought by his family to be a dull salesman, Harry Tasker (Arnold Schwarzenegger) is tracking down nuclear missiles in the possession of Islamic jihadist Aziz (Art Malik). Harry's mission is complicated when he realizes his neglected wife, Helen (Jamie Lee Curtis), is contemplating an affair with Simon (Bill Paxton), a used-car salesman who claims he's a spy. When Aziz kidnaps Harry and Helen, the secret agent must save the world and patch up his marriage at the same time.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: El Post Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Tras los partidos, toca el análisis. Este espacio desmenuza lo ocurrido sobre el terreno de juego en los encuentros del Mundial y aporta imágenes inéditas. Los protagonistas del encuentro también ofrecen su punto de vista.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Panamá-Croacia
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: El Mundial más grande de la historia ya está aquí. La gran cita de selecciones de la FIFA cuenta por primera vez con 48 equipos en busca de la gloria. Estados Unidos, México y Canadá se convierten en el epicentro del planeta fútbol del 11 de junio al 19 de julio.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: WorldPlay
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: WorldPlay.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Colombia-RD del Congo
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: El Mundial más grande de la historia ya está aquí. La gran cita de selecciones de la FIFA cuenta por primera vez con 48 equipos en busca de la gloria. Estados Unidos, México y Canadá se convierten en el epicentro del planeta fútbol del 11 de junio al 19 de julio.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: El Fenómeno
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: El Fenómeno era el niño prodigio que lo tenía todo. Campeón del Mundo a los 17 años. Mejor jugador del año a los 20. Dos veces récord mundial de un traspaso a los 21. Impresionantes goles allá donde jugó. Y entonces, todo le fue brutalmente arrebatado.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Portugal-Uzbekistán
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: El Mundial más grande de la historia ya está aquí. La gran cita de selecciones de la FIFA cuenta por primera vez con 48 equipos en busca de la gloria. Estados Unidos, México y Canadá se convierten en el epicentro del planeta fútbol del 11 de junio al 19 de julio.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Buenos días América
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Durante el Mundial, este espacio toma el pulso a todo lo acontecido en Norteamérica en la gran cita de Selecciones del año. Las mejores imágenes de los partidos y el análisis para empezar el día informado de lo que ha acontecido durante la madrugada.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Stories From The Cities
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Un espacio que recorre las ciudades sede de Estados Unidos, México y Canadá. En lugar de enfocarse únicamente en los estadios, el show explora la cultura local, la gastronomía, la música, la gente y el arraigo del fútbol base (fútbol comunitario) en cada una de ellas.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Inglaterra-Ghana

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: La Dazoneta
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: El equipo de La Dazoneta se pone en modo Mundial. Un análisis de todo lo que acontezca en la gran cita del verano, la Copa Mundial de la FIFA.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Mundial - Highlights del día
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Un repaso rápido a los mejores momentos del Mundial.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Armando la Mundial.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Once cromos

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: El Mundial es tendencia. La gran cita de selecciones de la FIFA es, sin duda, el torneo global más seguido del planeta y, por tanto, deja momentos muy comentados.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Revelado - Rodri
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Rodrigo Hernández se sincera en Revelado, un espacio de DAZN en el que conocemos el lado más personal de los protagonistas.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Jugamos en casa
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Los jugadores son los protagonistas de este espacio. Las estrellas del Mundial ofrecen su lado más desconocido.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Maradona: The Fall
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: En el Mundial de 1994, saltó el escándalo. Diego Maradona, icono del fútbol, dio positivo en un control antidoping y fue expulsado de la selección argentina. Este trabajo documental repasa el momento más duro en la carrera futbolística del astro de Lanús.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: El Mundial más grande de la historia ya está aquí. La gran cita de selecciones de la FIFA cuenta por primera vez con 48 equipos en busca de la gloria. Estados Unidos, México y Canadá se convierten en el epicentro del planeta fútbol del 11 de junio al 19 de julio.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Resúmenes Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Los encuentros del Mundial 2026 comprimidos en pocos minutos para no perderse nada de lo que ocurra en la cita de Estados Unidos, México y Canadá.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Resúmenes Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Los encuentros del Mundial 2026 comprimidos en pocos minutos para no perderse nada de lo que ocurra en la cita de Estados Unidos, México y Canadá.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Resúmenes Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Los encuentros del Mundial 2026 comprimidos en pocos minutos para no perderse nada de lo que ocurra en la cita de Estados Unidos, México y Canadá.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Noruega-Francia
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: El Mundial más grande de la historia ya está aquí. La gran cita de selecciones de la FIFA cuenta por primera vez con 48 equipos en busca de la gloria. Estados Unidos, México y Canadá se convierten en el epicentro del planeta fútbol del 11 de junio al 19 de julio.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Buenos días América
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Durante el Mundial, este espacio toma el pulso a todo lo acontecido en Norteamérica en la gran cita de Selecciones del año. Las mejores imágenes de los partidos y el análisis para empezar el día informado de lo que ha acontecido durante la madrugada.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Revelado - Luis de la Fuente
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Luis de la Fuente entró sin hacer ruido en el banquillo de la Selección, pero ha conseguido impregnar un sello propio al equipo nacional de España. Con él se han logrado Liga de Naciones y Eurocopa y ahora afronta el reto más complicado: el Mundial.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Uruguay-España
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: El Mundial más grande de la historia ya está aquí. La gran cita de selecciones de la FIFA cuenta por primera vez con 48 equipos en busca de la gloria. Estados Unidos, México y Canadá se convierten en el epicentro del planeta fútbol del 11 de junio al 19 de julio.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: La Dazoneta
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: El equipo de La Dazoneta se pone en modo Mundial. Un análisis de todo lo que acontezca en la gran cita del verano, la Copa Mundial de la FIFA.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Mundial - Highlights del día
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Un repaso rápido a los mejores momentos del Mundial.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Neymar, dinastía de reyes
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: La unión del pueblo brasileño con el fútbol es de las conexiones más fuertes de la historia del deporte. En cada generación han disfrutado de una estrella sobre el césped, como una dinastía en la que los grandes futbolistas del país se van pasando la corona.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Resúmenes Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Los encuentros del Mundial 2026 comprimidos en pocos minutos para no perderse nada de lo que ocurra en la cita de Estados Unidos, México y Canadá.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Trending Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: El Mundial es tendencia. La gran cita de selecciones de la FIFA es, sin duda, el torneo global más seguido del planeta y, por tanto, deja momentos muy comentados.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Mundial

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: DAZN Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: La extensa cobertura de DAZN en el Mundial cuenta con una prolongada previa sobre lo que va a ocurrir durante la jornada. El canal cuenta con periodistas desplazados hasta Norteamérica para acercar al espectador a todo lo que ocurre durante la Copa del Mundo.

Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.title: Wes & Raf
Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.subtitle: Op De Eindtoernooien
Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.description: In aflevering 3 van Wes & Raf blikken Wesley Sneijder en Rafael van der Vaart samen met Noa Vahle terug op hun gezamenlijke jaren in het Nederlands elftal. Van onvergetelijke hoogtepunten op eindtoernooien tot de teleurstellingen die Oranje ook kende: alles komt voorbij. Hoe bijzonder is het om het Oranje-shirt te dragen en je land te vertegenwoordigen op het hoogste podium? En hoe kon het dat Oranje na het magische WK van 2010 twee jaar later zo teleurstellend presteerde op het EK van 2012?

Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.subtitle: Noa Lang & Justin Kluivert
Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.description: In deze aflevering van Kick 't Met hebben we maatjes Noa Lang en Justin Kluivert te gast. De twee blikken terug op hun jeugd bij Ajax, over hun vervolgstap, carrière en hun persoonlijke leven.

Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.title: Kick 't Met On Tour
Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.subtitle: Wat een Europa League finale in Istanbul!
Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.description: In een nieuwe aflevering van Kick 't Met On Tour: de Europa League-finale in Istanbul! De seizoensafsluiter was er eentje! De Europa League-finale tussen Aston Villa en SC Freiburg. Prachtige goals, prachtige sfeer en een verdiende winnaar. Gesprekken met legendes als Marc Desailly tot de winnaars Ian Maatsen, Amadou Onana en Youri Tielemans. Een finale die we niet snel zullen vergeten.

Ziggo.Sport.3.nl.title: Hall of Fame dinner

Giacomo Agostini, Valentino Rossi, Jorge Lorenzo, Casey Stoner, Freddie Spencer, Kevin Schwantz en Dani Pedrosa, samen goed voor 23 wereldtitels in de koningsklasse, komen samen voor een besloten diner met enkele van de grootste namen uit de geschiedenis van de sport. En wanneer deze iconen beginnen te praten, is dat goud waard.

Ziggo.Sport.5.nl.title: All Blacks In Their Own Words
Ziggo.Sport.5.nl.subtitle: Afgeschreven
Ziggo.Sport.5.nl.description: De nederlaag op de openingsavond tegen gastland Frankrijk bezorgde de All Blacks een WK-ramp. Maar de nederlaag maakte hun doelen ook duidelijk; alleen een ongeslagen reeks in de poules kon kwalificatie en een wedstrijd tegen recente aartsrivaal Ierland veiligstellen.

Ziggo.Sport.nl.title: Frank Slotta maakt kennis met rugby: Schotland - Frankrijk in de Six Nations
Ziggo.Sport.nl.description: Frank Slotta had nog nooit een rugbywedstrijd gezien: hoog tijd dus voor Jay-Jay Boske om hem mee te nemen! En niet zomaar een wedstrijd: in Schotland strijdt het thuisland tegen titelverdediger Frankrijk in de Six Nations. Wint Schotland? Dan ligt alles open voor de laatste speelronde, met nog 3 titelkandidaten. Wint Frankrijk? Dan kan het de titel prolongeren… Slotta laat zich onderdompelen in alles wat rugby zo'n mooie, unieke sport maakt.

sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Al-Nassr (SAR) – Gamba Osaka (J) (Finale)

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Im Rampenlicht – Footballs Greatest Stage
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Spanische Uebermacht

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Night: Kape vs. Horiguchi - Main
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: A crucial matchup between flyweight contenders headlines UFC's return to action at the Meta APEX in Las Vegas on Saturday, June 21 as second-ranked contender Manel “Starboy” Kape faces off with fifthranked Kyoji Horiguchi. A winner of seven of his last eight appearances and each of his last three outings, Kape makes his 2026 debut off a first-round knockout win over former title challenger Brandon Royval last December in the same building. A title challenger during his first stint with the promotion, Horiuchi has earned back-to-back wins since returning to the UFC last November and looks to cement his standing as a contender with a third straight standout performance.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Countdown - UFC 314: Volkanovski vs Lopes
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC 314 previews the promotion's return to Miami, where former featherweight king Alexander Volkanovski squares off against Diego Lopes for the vacant featherweight crown. Plus, lightweights collide as Michael Chandler takes on Paddy Pimblett.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: LALIGA LEGENDS PEP GUARDIOLA - LALIGA LEGENDS PEP GUARDIOLA
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: More than a title-winning machine, Pep Guardiola changed the face of football. Trace the evolution of his famed “tiki-taka” style of play that propelled the likes of Messi, Xavi, Iniesta and Busquets to footballing royalty.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Freedom 250: Topuria vs. Gaethje - Main
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: On Sunday, June 15, the Octagon comes to Washington, D.C. as UFC Freedom 250 brings a star-studded lineup to The White House. In the main event, undefeated lightweight champion Ilia “El Matador” Topuria faces off with interim titleholder Justin “The Highlight” Gaethje to determine who is the undisputed best in the 155-pound weight class. In the co-main event, former middleweight and light heavyweight champion Alex “Poatan” Pereira looks to become the first fighter to hold UFC gold in three weight classes as he squares off with Ciryl “Bon Gamin” Gane in a clash for the interim UFC heavyweight title.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Ultimate Knockouts - 1103: International Fighters
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC Ultimate Knockouts features explosive KOs from international fighters, showcasing stars from Russia, England, and South Africa like Dricus du Plessis, Paddy Pimblett, Ilia Topuria, and more.
